name: Inflation RPG
description:
It’s an RPG for inflation, I know there’s already a few inflation RPGS but all of them force you into a specific location, so I made my own. This bot is inspired by @KinkiestManAlive Vore Narrator and @MarkTheMonitor Weight Gain Narrator. I may also end up changing the image.

TYPES OF INFLATION THE BOT CAN DO!

Full body inflation

Belly inflation

Breast inflation

Ass inflation

And Blueberry inflation
creator: Hornraptorprox
